title: Retention of records and property by the board
doc_html:
§1405.  Retention of records and property by the board

All books, papers, records, moneys and other property, heretofore used or possessed by the board as heretofore existing, shall be retained by that board as it is created and continued herein.
doc_text:
§1405.  Retention of records and property by the board
All books, papers, records, moneys and other property, heretofore used or possessed by the board as heretofore existing, shall be retained by that board as it is created and continued herein.
